title: garuleum schinzii
intro: Garuleum schinzii, also known as the Schinz's garuleum, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Garuleum schinzii include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extraction, often used in traditional medicine for its therapeutic benefits.
